hero_sub: Your weekly flow-state OS for peak performance
hero_body: A weekly letter for executives, founders, and high-performers who want to think more clearly, focus more deeply, and build a life that reliably produces their best work. One idea, one Praxis, every week.
masthead_title: A weekly practice of getting below the noise.
masthead_strap: No hacks. No listicles. One idea at the intersection of flow-state science, attention design, and how to work with AI without losing your cognitive edge.
aside_blurb: Most people are working harder than ever and feeling further behind than ever — not because they lack discipline, but because they never designed the system underneath the work.
what_body: Each issue covers one idea at the intersection of flow-state science, attention design, and how to work with AI without losing your cognitive edge. Every edition ends with a Praxis — one specific experiment to try this week.
what_quote: "Short enough to finish before your first meeting. Dense enough to stay with you all week."
subscribe_title: Get the next one in your inbox.
subscribe_body: Free. Drops weekly. Unsubscribe anytime. The signup is hosted on Beehiiv — enter your email below and we'll pass you over.

trio.label: A · Idea
trio.body: One specific concept — drawn from flow science, attention design, or the working-with-AI frontier. No hacks. No listicles.

trio.label: B · Frame
trio.body: Why it matters, and how it shows up in real working life. Short enough to read between meetings.

trio.label: C · Praxis
trio.body: One specific experiment to run this week. The part you'll remember on Wednesday.
